zh.Stapleton, Shropshire, England: 英國史洛普爾斯塔普萊頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecilia Alice Merbury於大約1365年出生在英國賀福爾維奧布利時，她的父親Hugh de Marbury29歲，母親Ellen Daniell26歲。她於1381年與Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford在英國賀福爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1417年在英國史洛普爾紐波特享年53歲，埋葬在英國史洛普爾布福德。

zh-hans.Stapleton, Shropshire, England: 英国史洛普爾斯塔普萊頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecilia Alice Merbury于大约1365年出生在英国賀福爾維奧布利时，她的父亲Hugh de Marbury29岁，母亲Ellen Daniell26岁。她于1381年与Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford在英国賀福爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1417年在英国史洛普爾紐波特享年53岁，埋葬在英国史洛普爾布福德。

nameMeanings.name: Merbury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Middlesex, Surrey and Sussex): habitational name from Medbury in Elstow (Bedfordshire). The placename derives from Old English mægth ‘maiden’ or mægden ‘maiden’ + burg ‘fortress’. This name is very rare in Britain and Ireland.

nameMeanings.name: Cecilia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

variants.name: Cecelia
meanings: From the Latin name Caecilia, feminine form of Caecilius ( see Cecil ). This was a good deal more common than the masculine form, largely due to the fame of the 2nd- or 3rd-century virgin martyr whose name is still mentioned daily in the Roman Catholic Canon of the Mass. She is regarded as the patron saint of music and has inspired works such as Purcell's ‘Ode on St Cecilia's Day’, although the reasons for this association are not clear.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Cecilia Alice Merbury was born about 1365, in Weobley, Herefordshire, England, her father, Hugh de Marbury, was 29 and her mother, Ellen Daniell, was 26. She married Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford in 1381, in Herefordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 7 daughters. She died in 1417, in Newport, Shropshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Burford, Shropshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecilia Alice Merbury est née environ 1365, à Weobley, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Marbury, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Ellen Daniell, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford en 1381, à Herefordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée en 1417, à Newport, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecilia Alice Merbury um 1365 in Weobley, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Marbury 29 und ihre Mutter Ellen Daniell 26. Sie hat 1381 in Herefordshire, England Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb 1417 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Newport, Shropshire, England und wurde in Burford, Shropshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Alice Merbury è nata il circa 1365 nel Weobley, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Hugh de Marbury, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Ellen Daniell, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford nel 1381, nel Herefordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 7 figlie. Morì nel 1417, nel Newport, Shropshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Burford, Shropshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecilia Alice Merburyが約1365年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアウエオブリーで生まれた時，父Hugh de Marburyは29歳，母Ellen Daniellは26歳であった。1381年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでRichard Cornwall 5th Baron Burfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1417年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアニュープオルトで53歳で死去し，イギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecilia Alice Merbury(이)가 대략 1365년 영국 허퍼드실르 베오블리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Marbury(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ellen Daniell(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1381년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 슈럽실르 뉴포트에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecilia Alice Merbury nasceu aproximadamente 1365, em Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Marbury, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Ellen Daniell, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford em 1381, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1417, em Newport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecilia Alice Merbury родилась около 1365 г. в местности веобли, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh de Marbury было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Ellen Daniell, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford в 1381 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 7 дочерей. Она умерла в 1417 г. в местности нюпорт, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecilia Alice Merbury nació aproximadamente 1365, en Weobley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Marbury, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Ellen Daniell, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Richard Cornwall 5th Baron Burford en 1381, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió en 1417, en Newport, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra.
